inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost of capital or required rate of return

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Cash value at end of project

formulas.npv: (inputs) => { const r = inputs.discountRate / 100; let npv = -inputs.initialInvestment; for (let t = 1; t <= inputs.periods; t++) { npv += inputs.periodicCashFlow / Math.pow(1 + r, t); } npv += inputs.salvageValue / Math.pow(1 + r, inputs.periods); return npv; }
formulas.profitabilityIndex: (inputs) => { const r = inputs.discountRate / 100; let npv = -inputs.initialInvestment; for (let t = 1; t <= inputs.periods; t++) { npv += inputs.periodicCashFlow / Math.pow(1 + r, t); } npv += inputs.salvageValue / Math.pow(1 + r, inputs.periods); return (npv + inputs.initialInvestment) / inputs.initialInvestment; }
